title: Pre-Order Obsidian Mirror Now for Age of Mythology: Retold!
description: Command the Aztec gods, master fear and illusion, and shape destiny in the next DLC for Age of Mythology: Retold – Obsidian Mirror. Choose from three new Major Gods, and nine new Minor Gods, delivering a bold new way to play through myth, sacrifice, and divine power. Lay traps, manipulate enemies through fear and illusion, and … Continued

title: Age of Empires IV: Yue Fei’s Legacy – Pre-Order Now!
description: Witness a tale of honor, betrayal, and courage in a new expansion for Age of Empires IV: Yue Fei’s Legacy, set to release May 7th and available for pre-order starting today! Live the legacy of Yue Fei in this new narrated campaign as he leads the Song Dynasty in a fight for survival against the Jin … Continued

title: Blood and Bones Pack Available Now for Age of Mythology: Retold
description: A new way to enjoy Age of Mythology: Retold has come to the Expansion Pass! The Blood and Bones Pack is a visual expansion that adds atmosphere, consequence, and gravity to every battle. Built for veteran players who know every god, every unit, and every myth, the Blood and Bones Pack reimagines the language of … Continued

title: Age of Mythology: Retold Update 19.5934
description: Welcome, Age of Mythology: Retold community to another exciting update! title: Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition – Update 170934
description: Welcome to a new update for Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition! This update focuses on stability, gameplay fixes, and targeted balance tuning across both core systems and recent content.
